programs.title: Orange County
programs.desc: Shaun is content to be a bright but unfocused surf slacker, until the day he discovers a novel by acclaimed author Martin Skinner. Inspired, he suddenly leaves behind Orange County to study creative writing Stanford University.

programs.title: The Perfect Score
programs.desc: Scarlett Johansson, Erika Christensen, Chris Evans and Darius Miles lead this coming-of-age tale about six students who break into the testing center and steal the answers to the S.A.T.

programs.title: In & Out
programs.desc: A former student who's now an actor tells an audience of millions that Howard is gay. He's outed when he didn't know he was in! Kevin Kline plays Howard, scrambling to go forth with his wedding and doing his best to assert his manliness.

programs.title: Mother
programs.desc: A neurotic, twice divorced sci-fi writer moves back in with his mom to solve his personal problems.

programs.title: The Addams Family
programs.desc: Come join The Addams Family for the most hilarious scarefest of this season or any other! When long-lost Uncle Fester reappears after twenty-five years in the Bermuda Triangle, Gomez and Morticia plan a celebration to wake the dead.

programs.title: Addams Family Values
programs.desc: The family’s future grows bleak when the no-good nanny marries Fester and has the kids shipped off to summer camp. But Wednesday still has a Thing or two up her sleeve.
